title: hibiscus tiliaceus var. hastatus
intro: Hibiscus tiliaceus var. hastatus, also known as the beach hibiscus or coastal hibiscus, is a variety of flowering plant in the mallow family that is native to tropical and subtropical coastal areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of H. tiliaceus var. hastatus include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent wound infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support digestive health and reduce symptoms of colds and flu.
